references.text: Carolin, RC. 1964. Geraniaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 6: 445-449
Veldkamp, JF & A Moerman. 1978. A review of the Malesian species of Geranium L. (Geraniaceae). Blumea 24: 463-477

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 1 August 2017

species.citation: (L.) L'Hér. , Hort. Kew., 1st Ed. 2 (1789) 414 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 323; ≡ Geranium cicutarium L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 680.
species.notes: Known from Pauai (BS 31669 JK Santos). Waste places, c. 2300m.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 2 May 2022

species.citation: L'Hér. , Hort. Kew., 1st Ed. 2 (1789) 423 ; Moore, Baileya 3 (1955) 88; Pancho & Gruezo, Vasc. Fl. Mt Makiling 2 (2006) 123.

H.E.Moore , Baileya 3 (1955) 22 ; Van der Walt, Bothalia 15 (1984) 365. = Pelargonium radula (Cav.) L'Hér. , Hort. Kew., 1st Ed. 2 (1789) 423 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 323; ≡ Geranium radula Cav. , Diss. 4, Quarta Diss. Bot. (1787) 262, nom. illeg., non Roth.
species.notes: Cultivated extensively as a pot plant in the Philippines where it rarely flowers, not naturalized.
